## Validation

<!-- List commands run, artifact paths generated, or checks intentionally skipped. -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `node scripts/check-docs.mjs`
- [ ] `pnpm pack:check`
- [ ] Harness verification when runtime, CLI, scaffold, or deployment behavior changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I followed `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.

- [ ] I am not disclosing a security vulnerability publicly.
